title: taraxacum ciscaucasicum
intro: Taraxacum ciscaucasicum, also known as the Caucasus dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion genus. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Taraxacum ciscaucasicum has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and infections, thanks to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support liver health, reduce oxidative stress, and promote overall well-being.
